questions.question: What is the main purpose of a preview deployment?
options: To see the app in a realistic environment before merging
questions.explanation: Preview deployments help you validate changes in an environment closer to production.

questions.question: Why are environment variables important in deployment?
options: They store build and runtime values outside the code
questions.explanation: Environment variables let the same code behave differently across environments without hardcoding secrets or URLs.

questions.question: What should you do before trusting a deployment?
options: Run a local production build or preview first
Assume the browser will fix it
questions.explanation: A local build/preview catches deployment issues earlier and with less noise.

questions.question: Why do preview URLs help teams?
options: They make it easier to review real changes before merge
They eliminate the need for branches
questions.explanation: Preview URLs keep feedback concrete by showing the actual running app.
